scope: Project-level reusable character reference assets. This pass covers Shen Weisang, Yan Nanzhi, and Shen Zhaomian as first-season priority character identity boards.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
Canyang Ao and Jinhe route palette reference
locked Shen Weisang costume-state reference; extend into character identity board, do not replace
locked Yan Nanzhi costume-state reference; extend into character identity board, do not replace
locked Yan Nanzhi carry-prop reference for moon-white jade, blood writ packet, black lacquer case, and hidden proof objects
southern old empire palette reference for reveal-state color balance
locked Zhaoming emblem reference for continuity audit; do not use as visible Shen Weisang clothing or equipment mark
locked old empire symbol extension reference; hidden object logic only for Shen Weisang, formal or concealed logic for Yan Nanzhi
locked Shen Zhaomian child-relic reference for burnt hair cord, herb pouch, and future insect-wax ring hint

downstream_usage: wardrobe and prop handoff for Shen Weisang
wardrobe and prop handoff for Yan Nanzhi
episode 01-02 village and abduction continuity reference
episode 06-12 Qingming Court identifier-state continuity reference
wardrobe and prop handoff for Shen Zhaomian

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems or create a new Shen Weisang crest.

Shen Weisang is a human remnant under Suming rule; do not place visible old-empire sun, moon, crescent, compass, badge, medallion, or crest marks on his clothing, shoulder guards, chest straps, cloak, bow case, pouch exterior, belt front, or background.

Preserve Shen Weisang's gold-red dark pattern as abstract bloodline and half-formed martial-vein residue on eye corner, shoulder blade, hidden inner seam, and charred hem edge; it must not become a faction badge or old-empire order.
Show the gold-red dark pattern in dormant and activated states: dormant as faint dark-gold cracks or seam residue, activated as short warm gold-red internal glow in close-up panels only.
Do not redesign the locked Zhaoming emblem or create a new Yan Nanzhi crest.
Preserve Shen Weisang as a 17-year-old hunter and guide, not an adult general.
Preserve Yan Nanzhi as an unmistakably female 18-year-old trained aristocratic fugitive of breathtaking cold noble beauty; royal proof objects remain hidden in travel states.
Yan Nanzhi must not become masculine, androgynous, broad-shouldered, heavy-jawed, thick-necked, or male-robed.
Yan Nanzhi fugitive and snowline states must not expose a clean royal badge on the chest, cloak, belt front, or background.
Distress clothing only through smoke, soot, focal charred hem, repair stitches, frost, and wear while preserving complete functional structure.
Use Shen Weisang low magic only as small gold-red broken residue near eye, shoulder blade, hidden inner seam, and charred hem edge.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
Preserve Shen Zhaomian as an 8-10-year-old child across village, post-fire, and Qingming Court states; never age her up or horrorize her.
For Shen Zhaomian, do not create or redesign any faction badge; use the herb pouch, burnt hair cord, white child robe, and insect-wax identification ring as identity anchors.
